posts.title: Why I Chose Minimalism
posts.excerpt: The web has become bloated. Trackers, popups, cookie banners. I wanted a space that loads instantly.

posts.title: The Beauty of Plain Text
posts.excerpt: There's something honest about plain text. No hidden formatting. No proprietary formats.

posts.title: Digital Gardens vs Blogs
posts.excerpt: Blogs are chronological. Gardens are topological. I'm trying to build something in between.
